name_en: 🔥Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag 💄and it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! ✅👻❤️Featuring exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin 💥A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯

The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
Size: 32CM~26CM~16CM
Style No.: 8015
Color: Canvas Brown
